channel.title: Archive on Michael Healy's ePortfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Archive on Michael Healy's ePortfolio

item.title: Feminisms and Rhetorics 2015
item.description: Presented “Celebrating Grandma: (Re)Making (or Appropriating?) Agency in the Archive” on the panel “(Re)Making Story: Agency and Gender in Teaching, Researching, and Writing.”
